title: Crisp Brazilian Lettuce Salad
description: A light and refreshing salad featuring crisp lettuce, lacquer-glaze, and a variety of Brazilian flavors, served on a bamboo tray.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the lettuce, lacquer glaze, orange juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Toss the salad gently to combine, making sure the lettuce is evenly coated with the dressing.
Sprinkle the toasted coconut flakes and chopped cilantro over the top of the salad.
Toss the salad again to combine, being careful not to bruise the lettuce.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the salad a final toss and adjust the seasoning if necessary.
Transfer the salad to a bamboo tray and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional cilantro and coconut flakes if desired.
